Home.about:
Visual identities for companies and professionals, with cohesive graphic systems for both digital and print use.

EPUB ebook conversion and formatting for publishing houses and independent authors, optimizing files for distribution on Kindle, Kobo, and other digital platforms.

Web design and development combined into a single service to transform ideas into clear, functional, and communication-driven visual solutions.
Home.CTA: If you have a project in mind or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!

Profile.title: Profile. Graphic designer and web developer — Tydedev
Profile.description: Graphic designer and web developer based in Italy. Based in Torre del Greco (NA), Italy and open to remote work opportunities.
Profile.intro: Graphic Designer and Web Developer born in Torre del Greco (Italy) in 1991. With a detail-oriented approach, I create brand identities from scratch, translating the client’s vision into visual materials.
Profile.availability: Available for freelance and remote work.
Profile.activity_1: Managed a personal Instagram account showcasing 3D illustrations and 3D animations, achieving over 11k views.
Profile.activity_2: Volunteered as a Logo Designer for a non-profit stage theater company and sports podcast.
Profile.activity_3: Creative Writing for a non-profit Cultural Magazine, producing short stories focused on Art History, artists, and artistic movements.
Profile.activity_4: Photographer and Graphic Designer for Cultural Events in Milan.

GraphicDesign.title: Graphic Design Portfolio
GraphicDesign.description: Visual materials created for clients, including logos, brochures, websites, and social media graphics.

Works.title: Brand identities, logos, websites and social media graphics — Tydedev
Works.description: A selection of projects showcasing my skills in graphic design and web development. Projects include logos, brand identities, stationery, websites, and digital and print assets.
Works.intro: Projects include logos, brand identities, stationery, websites, and digital and print assets.

Bascorp.subtitle: Logo, visual identity, website
Bascorp.description: Visual identity and website for Bascorp, a new construction company that stands out for an innovative and sustainable approach. The project included the creation of a modern and versatile logo, and a responsive website that highlights the services offered with a clean and functional design.

EpubConversion.title: Ebook Conversion and Digital Publishing for Publishers and Authors
EpubConversion.description: Creation and conversion of editorial content into EPUB format, ensuring compatibility with all eReader devices: Kindle, Kobo, and Apple Books. Ideal service for publishers, independent authors, and anyone looking to digitize their content for distribution on digital platforms. Contact me to discuss your project and a personalized quote.
EpubConversion.intro: Ebook Conversion and Digital Publishing for Publishers and Authors
EpubConversion.info1: Creation and conversion of editorial content into EPUB format, ensuring compatibility with all eReader devices: Kindle, Kobo, and Apple Books.
EpubConversion.info2: EBOOKS developed according to international standards defined by the World Wide Web Consortium (W3C), to ensure compatibility, accessibility, and optimal performance across all digital platforms.
EpubConversion.ideal_for: Ideal service for publishers, independent authors, and anyone looking to digitize their content for distribution on digital platforms.
EpubConversion.contact: Contact me to discuss your project and a personalized quote.
